About

CoreWeave, Inc. is an American artificial intelligence cloud-computing company based in Livingston, New Jersey. It specializes in providing cloud-based graphics processing unit infrastructure to AI developers and enterprises, and also develops its own chip management software. Founded as Atlantic Crypto in 2017 and focused on high-performance computing, CoreWeave has its own data centers operating in the United States and Europe, with some dedicated to multiple companies and some to a single client. Its $1.6 billion supercomputer data center for Nvidia in Plano, Texas, has been described by Nvidia as the fastest AI supercomputer in the world. Wikipedia
Founded
